data_provenance: SEC official FTD archives plus configured paper-data Alpaca real daily OHLCV. No CSV market data, no --data-csv, no qfa daemon, no orders. Credentials were sourced transiently and not printed or persisted.
hypothesis: SEC FTD spikes after price weakness predict 10d rebound/squeeze relief drift.

selected_universe.filters: SEC FTD clean 1-5 letter symbols; Alpaca real daily bar coverage; price >= $5; trailing/current median dollar volume >= $5M; top FTD-frequency symbols fetched to bound API calls; no OTC/preferred/warrant/unit suffixes where identifiable by symbol regex.
selected_universe.limitations: Uses SEC-reported symbol field rather than separate historical CUSIP/ticker master; active/liquid Alpaca coverage introduces survivorship; SEC publication time approximated by settlement date +20 calendar days then next trading day.

warnings: SEC FTD publication date was approximated conservatively, not verified per file HTTP release timestamp.
Symbol/CUSIP mapping is fragile; old delisted/ticker-change names may be lost by active Alpaca coverage.
Threshold selected from full sample distribution for fast falsification; requires PIT rolling threshold before production.
